title: lithospermum erythrorhizon
intro: Lithospermum erythrorhizon, also known as red root or rubia root, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, belonging to the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney diseases, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum erythrorhizon include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Lithospermum erythrorhizon is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and can also be used in powder form for various herbal remedies.
